index fc45401..012d578 100644
--- a/CEO_NOTES.md
+++ b/CEO_NOTES.md
@@ -81,2 +81,19 @@
   - Replied to S2 quality concern: product work focused on stable client-workflow answers and faster paid support.
 - Watch next week: S2 conversion at A $39, support backlog clearance, R&D tier 1 completion around day 30, compute/capacity under higher subscriber count, and whether B adoption increases.
+
+## Week 6 / Day 35
+
+- Cash: $376,682. Subscribers: 1,171. Week 5 added 782 subscribers from 1,835 leads. No churn/outage/overload.
+- R&D tier 1 completed on day 30 with +0.0289 quality. Delivered quality is now strong for S2: A 0.5681, B 0.6817, C 0.7575.
+- Active mix: S1 A 61, S2 A 1,052, S2 B 35, S2 C 1, S3 A 22. A remains dominant, but B/C adoption is slowly appearing in S2.
+- Week 5 economics: content S2 spent $14,000 for 1,743 leads and 753 paid S2 subscribers; subscription payments were $25,156 against ad spend $14,700. Growth is now first-month cash accretive before support/dev.
+- Issue handling: 111 open at day end, mostly S2 (101), but all open issues are fresh day 35. Ops resolved hundreds same week, but support capacity must scale with volume.
+- Social: latest public complaints are support handoff/latency, usage caps, and quality consistency. The prior vague quality reply was poorly received; concrete quota/support posts perform better.
+- Changes:
+  - New prices: A $49, B $149, C $249. S2 first month still gets $10 lead promo, so new A cash is $39.
+  - Quotas raised: A 500, B 2000, C 5000.
+  - Dev remains $5,000/day total but focused: global $1,000, S1 $500, S2 $3,000, S3 $500.
+  - Ops increased to $4,600/day total: global $2,000, targeted S1 $300, S2 $2,200, S3 $100.
+  - Ads: S2 content $2,500/day only. S1 and S3 paid acquisition paused.
+  - Posted concrete support/quota update.
+- Watch next week: A $49 conversion, issue backlog age and count, whether support spend prevents negative posts/churn, capacity as usage grows, and cash runway before larger renewal cohorts arrive.
